content:
Cases
* Please add a pair of cases where the difference is located on the rightmost column (but not at any corner) of the grid.

Thanks.

Done! Thank you :)

Also did you know they added buttons for test case reordering :o
Damn, I meant for this to be a beginner-friendly clash :/ Will wait to see what others think! But if it's too difficult I might scrap this clash. Thanks for the feedback @VinceMC.
Yes, CG announced it on their Discord server two days ago.
